summary: An order form under which Brightpath Software provides Cascade Retail Group its Analytics Platform (Business plan, 50 seats) on a 12-month auto-renewing subscription for USD $48,000 per year.

key_details.label: Subscription
key_details.value: Brightpath Analytics Platform — Business plan, up to 50 named user seats, with email support and a 99.9% uptime SLA
key_details.evidence_quote: provisioned for up to fifty (50) named user seats, together with standard email support and a 99.9% uptime service level

key_details.label: Term
key_details.value: 12 months initial, auto-renewing for successive 12-month terms; 30 days' non-renewal notice
key_details.evidence_quote: The initial subscription term is twelve (12) months from the Effective Date

key_details.label: Fee
key_details.value: USD $48,000 annual subscription fee, invoiced annually in advance, net 30
key_details.evidence_quote: annual subscription fee of forty-eight thousand U.S. dollars (USD $48,000)

key_details.label: IP / license
key_details.value: Provider retains all IP; Customer gets a non-exclusive, non-transferable license for internal business use during the term
key_details.evidence_quote: non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the platform during the subscription term

key_details.label: Termination
key_details.value: Either party may terminate for material breach uncured after 30 days; 30-day data export window
key_details.evidence_quote: terminate this Order for material breach that remains uncured thirty (30) days after written notice

key_details.label: Limitation of liability
key_details.value: No indirect, incidental, or consequential damages; capped at fees paid in the trailing 12 months
key_details.evidence_quote: aggregate liability arising out of or related to this Order shall not exceed the total fees paid by the Customer in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim

key_details.label: Governing law
key_details.evidence_quote: laws of the State of California
